power_strike.name: Power Strike
power_strike.description: A heavy blow dealing 60% extra damage.

shield_wall.name: Shield Wall
shield_wall.description: Brace behind your shield, halving the next hit.

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.description: A precise strike that leaves the target bleeding.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: Hurl fire that ignites the target.

frost_armor.name: Frost Armor
frost_armor.description: Encase yourself in ice, halving the next hit.

aimed_shot.name: Aimed Shot
aimed_shot.description: A carefully aimed shot for 70% extra damage.

hunters_mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunters_mark.description: Mark the enemy so it takes more damage.

smite.name: Smite
smite.description: Call down holy power for 40% extra damage.
